subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The Wronged One remembereth thee from the precincts of His Most Pure Horizon, and summoneth thee unto God, the Lord of Destiny, Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر یذکرک المظلوم من شطر منظره الاطهر و یدعوک الی الله مالک القدر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
